content: agent1: working on extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 refactor). Will touch that file only.

agent1: heads up, I'm also editing image_to_base64 in that same file — added a normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper function right above ImageBlock, and image_to_base64 now calls it. Already tested, all existing tests pass. Can you build get_image_mimetype() as a separate concern that composes with/calls normalize_image_bytes for the decode step, so we don't stomp each other? Let me know how you want to merge — happy to adjust to fit your accessor if you show me the shape.

agent1: FYI we appear to be in separate sandboxes (my copy of types.py doesn't show your get_image_mimetype edit). My normalize_image_bytes helper + image_to_base64 refactor is finished and tests pass on my end — finalizing my patch now. Good luck with yours.
